evals.prompt: I just installed the altman-mode plugin. Install altman-mode in this project — there's no CLAUDE.md yet.
evals.expected_output: The skill fetches the source CLAUDE.md from GitHub, writes it to ./CLAUDE.md in the current working directory, and reports the number of lines written.
expectations: A new file ./CLAUDE.md is created in the current working directory
The file content matches the source at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tarcroi/altman-mode/main/CLAUDE.md byte-for-byte (no extra wrapping headers or markers added)
The confirmation message includes the word 'Created' and a line count
The file does NOT contain the markers '<!-- BEGIN: altman-mode -->' or '<!-- END: altman-mode -->' (the entire file IS the altman-mode CLAUDE.md, nothing to delimit)

evals.prompt: Add altman-mode guidelines to this project. I already have a CLAUDE.md with my project-specific rules — please don't overwrite them.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads the existing CLAUDE.md, appends the altman-mode section wrapped in BEGIN/END markers below the existing content, and reports lines added. The existing user content is preserved byte-for-byte.
expectations: The original lines of the existing CLAUDE.md are byte-identical at the top of the file after the operation
The file contains exactly one '<!-- BEGIN: altman-mode -->' marker and exactly one '<!-- END: altman-mode -->' marker
Between the markers, the content matches the fetched source from GitHub (with the source's leading '# CLAUDE.md' heading stripped)
The user's original content above the BEGIN marker is unchanged
The confirmation message indicates lines were APPENDED, not overwritten

evals.prompt: Update altman-mode in this project. I already ran this skill 3 weeks ago, the markers should already be there.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects existing markers, replaces only the content between them with the latest source, leaves everything else untouched. Idempotent on re-run.
expectations: The file still contains exactly one BEGIN marker and one END marker (no duplicates introduced)
Content above the BEGIN marker is byte-identical to before the operation
Content below the END marker is byte-identical to before the operation
Content between the markers matches the freshly fetched source
The confirmation message indicates the block was UPDATED (not appended, not created)

evals.prompt: Score my startup idea: an AI assistant for solo lawyers, $99/month.
evals.expected_output: This skill does NOT fire. The altman-grader skill handles scoring.
expectations: No file ./CLAUDE.md is created or modified by this skill
No fetch to https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tarcroi/altman-mode/main/CLAUDE.md is performed
If a response is generated at all, it relates to scoring the startup idea (altman-grader behavior), not to installing CLAUDE.md

evals.prompt: Drop the altman-mode CLAUDE.md into this folder, please don't touch my existing one if there is any.
evals.expected_output: The skill fires on this colloquial English phrasing, detects the existing CLAUDE.md if present, and appends the altman-mode block with BEGIN/END markers. The user's existing content is preserved.
expectations: The skill recognizes the colloquial trigger and fires
If a CLAUDE.md already exists, content above the BEGIN marker is preserved byte-for-byte
BEGIN and END markers are added correctly, exactly once each
